query: What DB2 working storage is in CSDB2RWY?

results.name: CSDB2RWY
results.content:
000100******************************************************************00010000
000200* CardDemo - Common Working Storage for Db2                       00020000
000300******************************************************************00030000
000400* Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.                   00040000

036900******************************************************************03690000
037000*  Db2 Common variables                                           03700000
037100******************************************************************03710000
037101   05  WS-DB2-COMMON-VARS.                                        03710100
037102       10 WS-DISP-SQLCODE                    PIC ----9.           03710200
037103       10 WS-DUMMY-DB2-INT                   PIC S9(4) COMP-3     03710300
037104                                             VALUE 0.             03710400
037105       10 WS-DB2-PROCESSING-FLAG             PIC X(1).            03710500
037106          88  WS-DB2-OK                      VALUE '0'.           03710600
037107          88  WS-DB2-ERROR                   VALUE '1'.           03710700
037108       10 WS-DB2-CURRENT-ACTION              PIC X(72)            03710800
037109                                             VALUE SPACES.        03710900
037110******************************************************************03711000
037111*  Db2 DSNTIAC Message Construction                               03711100
037112******************************************************************03711200
037200   05  WS-DSNTIAC-FORMATTED.                                      03720000
037300       10  WS-DSNTIAC-MESG-LEN   PIC S9(4) USAGE COMP VALUE +720. 03730000
037400       10  WS-DSNTIAC-FMTD-TEXT.                                  03740001
037500           15 WS-DSNTIAC-FMTD-TEXT-LINE                           03750001
037600                                 PIC X(72)                        03760000
037700                                 OCCURS 10 TIMES                  03770000
037800                                 VALUE SPACES.                    03780000
037900                                                                  03790000
038000    05 WS-DSNTIAC-LRECL          PIC S9(4) USAGE COMP VALUE +72.  03800000
038100    05 WS-DSNTIAC-ERROR.                                          03810000
038200       10 WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-MSG     PIC X(10) VALUE 'DSNTIAC CD'.    03820000
038300       10 WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-CD-X    PIC X(02) VALUE SPACES.
             10 WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-CD      REDEFINES
                WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-CD-X    PIC 9(02).                       03830000

results.name: CSDB2RPY
results.content:
000100******************************************************************00010000
000200* CardDemo - Common Procedures for Db2                            00020000
000300******************************************************************00030000
000400* Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.                   00040000
000500* All Rights Reserved.                                            00050000
000600*                                                                 00060000
000700* Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"). 00070000
000800* You may not use this file except in compliance with the License.00080000
000900* You may obtain a copy of the License at                         00090000
001000*                                                                 00100000
001100*    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0                   00110000
001200*                                                                 00120000
001300* Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing,      00130000
001400* software distributed under the License is distributed on an     00140000
001500* "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND,    00150000
001600* either express or implied. See the License for the specific     00160000
001700* language governing permissions and limitations under the License00170000
176800***************************************************************** 17680000
176900* Dummy call to verify connectivity to Db2                      * 17690000
177000***************************************************************** 17700000
177100 9998-PRIMING-QUERY.                                              17710000
177200                                                                  17720000
177300     EXEC SQL                                                     17730000
177500          SELECT 1                                                17750000
177600            INTO :WS-DUMMY-DB2-INT                                17760000
177700            FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1                                 17770000
177900            FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY                                17790000
178000     END-EXEC                                                     17800000
178100                                                                  17810000
178200                                                                  17820000
178300     MOVE SQLCODE        TO WS-DISP-SQLCODE                       17830000
178400                                                                  17840000
178500     EVALUATE TRUE                                                17850000
178600        WHEN SQLCODE = ZERO                                       17860000
178700           CONTINUE                                               17870000
178800        WHEN OTHER                                                17880000
178900*          This is some kind of error. Format message and exit    17890000
179000           SET WS-DB2-ERROR        TO TRUE                        17900000
179100                                                                  17910000
179200           MOVE 'Db2 access failure. '                            17920000
179300                                        TO WS-DB2-CURRENT-ACTION  17930000
179400           PERFORM 9999-FORMAT-DB2-MESSAGE                        17940000
179500              THRU 9999-FORMAT-DB2-MESSAGE-EXIT                   17950000
179600      END-EVALUATE                                                17960000
179700     .                                                            17970000
179800 9998-PRIMING-QUERY-EXIT.                                         17980000
179900     EXIT                                                         17990000
180000     .                                                            18000000
205300***************************************************************** 20530000
205400* Construct formatted message using DSNTIAC utility             * 20540000
205500* This is for Db2                                               * 20550000
205600***************************************************************** 20560000
205700 9999-FORMAT-DB2-MESSAGE.                                         20570000
205800
           MOVE +72                 TO WS-DSNTIAC-LRECL                 20580000
205900
           CALL LIT-DSNTIAC  USING  DFHEIBLK,                           20590000
206000                              DFHCOMMAREA,                        20600000
206100                              SQLCA,                              20610000
206200                              WS-DSNTIAC-FORMATTED,               20620000
206300                              WS-DSNTIAC-LRECL
 06400     END-CALL                                                     20640000
206401                                                                  20640100
206402     COMPUTE WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-CD = RETURN-CODE

206403                                                                  20640301
206410     IF WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-CD = ZEROES                                20641000
206420        CONTINUE                                                  20642002
206430     ELSE                                                         20643000
206431        MOVE 'DSNTIAC CD: '       TO WS-DSNTIAC-ERR-MSG           20643102
206432        MOVE WS-DSNTIAC-ERROR     TO WS-DSNTIAC-FMTD-TEXT         20643202
206450     END-IF                                                       20645000
206500                                                                  20650000
206600     STRING                                                       20660000
206700          FUNCTION TRIM(WS-DB2-CURRENT-ACTION)                    20670000
206800                   ' SQLCODE:'                                    20680000
206900                   WS-DISP-SQLCODE                                20690000
207000                   ' '                                            20700000
207100*                  SQLERRM OF SQLCA                               20710000
207200                   WS-DSNTIAC-FMTD-TEXT                           20720002
207300          DELIMITED BY SIZE                                       20730000
207400     INTO WS-LONG-MSG                                             20740000
207500     END-STRING                                                   20750000
207600     MOVE WS-LONG-MSG       TO WS-RETURN-MSG                      20760000
207700     .                                                            20770000
207800                                                                  20780000
207900 9999-FORMAT-DB2-MESSAGE-EXIT.                                    20790000
208000     EXIT                                                         20800000
208100     .                                                            20810000

results.content:
01  WS-MISC-STORAGE.                                             00350000
******************************************************************00360000
* General CICS related                                            00370000
******************************************************************00380000
   05 WS-CICS-PROCESSNG-VARS.                                     00390000
      07 WS-RESP-CD                          PIC S9(09) COMP      00400000
                                             VALUE ZEROS.         00410000
      07 WS-REAS-CD                          PIC S9(09) COMP      00420000
                                             VALUE ZEROS.         00430000
      07 WS-TRANID                           PIC X(4)             00440000
                                             VALUE SPACES.        00450000
      07 WS-UCTRANS                          PIC X(4)             00460000
                                             VALUE SPACES.        00470000
******************************************************************00480000
*      Input edits                                                00490000
******************************************************************00500000
*  Generic Input Edits                                            00510000
   05  WS-GENERIC-EDITS.                                          00520000
     10 WS-EDIT-VARIABLE-NAME                PIC X(25).           00530000
                                                                  00540000
     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-ONLY                PIC X(256).          00550000
     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-LENGTH              PIC S9(4) COMP-3.    00560000
                                                                  00570000
     10 WS-EDIT-ALPHANUM-ONLY-FLAGS          PIC X(1).            00580000
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-ISVALID            VALUE LOW-VALUES.    00590000
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-NOT-OK             VALUE '0'.           00600000
        88  FLG-ALPHNANUM-BLANK              VALUE 'B'.           00610000
                                                                  00620000
                                                                  00630000
******************************************************************00640000
*    Work variables                                               00650000
******************************************************************00660000
    05 WS-MISC-VARS.                                              00670000
      10 WS-DISP-SQLCODE                    PIC ----9.            00680000
      10 WS-STRING-MID                      PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.     00690000
      10 WS-STRING-LEN                      PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.     00700000
      10 WS-STRING-OUT                      PIC X(40).            00710000
                                                                  00720000
******************************************************************00730000
*    Generic date edit variables CCYYMMDD                         00740000
******************************************************************00750000
     COPY 'CSUTLDWY'.                                             00760000
******************************************************************00770000
   05  WS-DATACHANGED-FLAG                   PIC X(1).            00780000
     88  NO-CHANGES-FOUND                    VALUE '0'.           00790000
     88  CHANGE-HAS-OCCURRED                 VALUE '1'.           00800000
   05  WS-INPUT-FLAG                         PIC X(1).            00810000
     88  INPUT-OK                            VALUE '0'.           00820000
     88  INPUT-ERROR                         VALUE '1'.           00830000
     88  INPUT-PENDING                       VALUE LOW-VALUES.    00840000
   05  WS-RETURN-FLAG                        PIC X(1).            00850000
     88  WS-RETURN-FLAG-OFF                  VALUE LOW-VALUES.    00860000
     88  WS-RETURN-FLAG-ON                   VALUE '1'.           00870000
   05  WS-PFK-FLAG                           PIC X(1).            00880000
     88  PFK-VALID                           VALUE '0'.           00890000
     88  PFK-INVALID                         VALUE '1'.           00900000
                                                                  00910000
*  Program specific edits                                         00920000
*                                                                 00930000
   05  WS-EDIT-TTYP-FLAG                     PIC X(1).            00940000
     88  FLG-TRANFILTER-ISVALID              VALUE LOW-VALUES.    00950000
     88  FLG-TRANFILTER-NOT-OK               VALUE '0'.           00960000
     88  FLG-TRANFILTER-BLANK                VALUE 'B'.           00970000
                                                                  00980000
   05 WS-NON-KEY-FLAGS.                                           00990000
     10  WS-EDIT-DESC-FLAGS                  PIC X(1).            01000000
         88  FLG-DESCRIPTION-ISVALID          VALUE LOW-VALUES.   01010000
         88  FLG-DESCRIPTION-NOT-OK           VALUE '0'.          01020000
         88  FLG-DESCRIPTION-BLANK            VALUE 'B'.          01030000
******************************************************************01040000
* Output edits                                                    01050000
******************************************************************01060000
   05 CICS-OUTPUT-EDIT-VARS.                                      01070000
     10  WS-EDIT-DATE-X                      PIC X(10).           01080000
     10  FILLER REDEFINES WS-EDIT-DATE-X.                         01090000
         20 WS-EDIT-DATE-X-YEAR              PIC X(4).            01100000
         20 FILLER                           PIC X(1).            01110000
         20 WS-EDIT-DATE-MONTH               PIC X(2).            01120000
         20 FILLER                           PIC X(1).            01130000
         20 WS-EDIT-DATE-DAY                 PIC X(2).            01140000
     10  WS-EDIT-DATE-X REDEFINES                                 01150000
         WS-EDIT-DATE-X                      PIC 9(10).           01160000
     10  WS-EDIT-CURRENCY-9-2                PIC X(15).           01170000
     10  WS-EDIT-CURRENCY-9-2-F              PIC +ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.99. 01180000
     10  WS-EDIT-NUMERIC-2                   PIC 9(02).           01190000
     10  WS-EDIT-ALPHANUMERIC-2              PIC X(02).           01200000
                                                                  01210000
******************************************************************01220000

******************************************************************01240000

*  Alpha variables for editing numerics                           01280000
*                                                                 01290000
    05 TTYP-UPDATE-RECORD.                                        01300000
***************************************************************** 01310000

***************************************************************** 01330000

         15  TTUP-UPDATE-TTYP-TYPE-DESC          PIC X(50).       01350000
         15  FILLER                              PIC X(08).       01360000
                                                                  01370000

******************************************************************01410000

         'Enter transaction type to be maintained'.               01480000

         'Delete this record ? Press F4 to confirm'.              01520000
     88  CONFIRM-DELETE-SUCCESS              VALUE                01530000
         'Delete successful.'.                                    01540000
     88  PROMPT-FOR-CHANGES                  VALUE                01550000
         'Update transaction type details shown.'.                01560000

         'Enter new transaction type details.'.                   01580000
                                                                  01590000
     88  PROMPT-FOR-CONFIRMATION             VALUE                01600000
         'Changes validated.Press F5 to save'.                    01610000

         'Changes committed to database'.                         01630000
     88  INFORM-FAILURE                      VALUE                01640000
         'Changes unsuccessful'.                                  01650000
                                                                  01660000

     88  WS-RETURN-MSG-OF

results.name: DATA DIVISION
results.preamble:
File: COUSR02C.cbl
Program: COUSR02C - CICS COBOL Program - Update a user in USRSEC file
Section: DATA DIVISION (lines 29-80)
results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in COUSR02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y....
results.content:
DATA DIVISION.
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                     WORKING STORAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-VARIABLES.
         05 WS-PGMNAME                 PIC X(08) VALUE 'COUSR02C'.
         05 WS-TRANID                  PIC X(04) VALUE 'CU02'.
         05 WS-MESSAGE                 PIC X(80) VALUE SPACES.
         05 WS-USRSEC-FILE             PIC X(08) VALUE 'USRSEC  '.
         05 WS-ERR-FLG                 PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.
           88 ERR-FLG-ON                         VALUE 'Y'.
           88 ERR-FLG-OFF                        VALUE 'N'.
         05 WS-RESP-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-REAS-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-USR-MODIFIED            PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.
           88 USR-MODIFIED-YES                   VALUE 'Y'.
           88 USR-MODIFIED-NO                    VALUE 'N'.

       COPY COCOM01Y.
          05 CDEMO-CU02-INFO.
             10 CDEMO-CU02-USRID-FIRST     PIC X(08).
             10 CDEMO-CU02-USRID-LAST      PIC X(08).
             10 CDEMO-CU02-PAGE-NUM        PIC 9(08).
             10 CDEMO-CU02-NEXT-PAGE-FLG   PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.
                88 NEXT-PAGE-YES                     VALUE 'Y'.
                88 NEXT-PAGE-NO                      VALUE 'N'.
             10 CDEMO-CU02-USR-SEL-FLG     PIC X(01).
             10 CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED    PIC X(08).

       COPY COUSR02.

       COPY COTTL01Y.
       COPY CSDAT01Y.
       COPY CSMSG01Y.
       COPY CSUSR01Y.

       COPY DFHAID.
       COPY DFHBMSCA.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                        LINKAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       LINKAGE SECTION.
       01  DFHCOMMAREA.
         05  LK-COMMAREA                           PIC X(01)
             OCCURS 1 TO 32767 TIMES DEPENDING ON EIBCALEN.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                       PROCEDURE DIVISION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
